channel.title: Warehouse on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Warehouse on jamesm.blog

item.title: The Quiet Death of the Classic Data Warehouse Pattern
item.description: The pattern that defined enterprise analytics for two decades - ingest, transform, load into a star schema in a warehouse - is no longer the default in 2026. A look at what replaced it, why, and what is genuinely lost along the way.
